data.title: Vantage Drilling International Announces Agreement to Merge with Eldorado Drilling AS
data.description: On May 29, 2026, Vantage Drilling International Ltd. disclosed their agreement with Eldorado Drilling AS for a merger deal. The Merger Agreement, dated the same day, outlines the acquisition of Vantage Drilling by Eldorado. Eldorado, a Norwegian private limited company, will conduct the merger through their subsidiary, Eldorado Drilling Merger Sub Limited, a Bermuda exempted company. This transaction will result in the Company becoming a wholly owned subsidiary of Eldorado.

data.title: Binance Coin Hits Wall Street With The First Spot BNB ETF
data.description: VanEck has introduced the initial U.S.-listed ETF connected to Binance Coin (CRYPTO: BNB), broadening investor opportunities for one of the major cryptocurrencies via a regulated ETF format. The fresh VanEck BNB ETF (NASDAQ: VBNB) grants direct access to Binance Coin without the necessity for investors to oversee crypto wallets or private keys. The ETF's shares are supported by BNB tokens safeguarded in cold storage by Anchorage Digital Bank, ensuring top-notch custodianship for the underlying assets. Main highlights of the fund include: Shares backed by tangible BNB in cold storage, 0.39% expense ratio, avenue for BNB exposure through conventional brokerage accounts, removing the necessity for...

data.title: Alton Introduces New DEWALT® 20V MAX* Portable Air Cooler, Delivering Jobsite Performance with Summer-Ready Versatility
data.description: Introducing a versatile 3-in-1 cooling system tailored for professionals, engineered to support activities throughout the week and weekend. Recently, on May 29, 2026, in Western Chicago, Alton Industry LTD Group, an official licensee of DEWALT®, unveiled the latest innovation - the DEWALT 20V MAX*. This robust solution caters to a wide range of cooling needs and is set to make a significant impact in the market.

data.title: Liftoff Announces Launch of Initial Public Offering
data.description: On May 29, 2026, a company named Liftoff Mobile, Inc. based in Redwood City, California, revealed the commencement of their roadshow for their upcoming initial public offering. Liftoff is recognized worldwide for providing advanced solutions in performance marketing and monetization within the mobile app industry. This move signifies their intention to publicly offer shares of their common stock to potential investors.

data.title: Largest PC maker Lenovo's stock skyrockets 109% in May due to AI server growth, hitting best month in 27 years. AI revenue accounts for 38% of quarterly sales, with Goldman Sachs doubling its target.
data.description: In May, the largest PC manufacturer globally experienced a significant surge of 109% in its stock value following a successful quarter where revenue from artificial intelligence technologies reached an impressive 38% of total sales. As a result of this performance, investment firm Goldman Sachs increased its target for the company by more than double.

data.title: New state investment fuels Florida Poly's continued momentum and growth
data.description: In Lakeland, Florida, on May 29, 2026, Florida Polytechnic University has received a noteworthy boost for its expansion plans. The Florida Legislature recently greenlit $19 million in the upcoming state budget for the 2026-2027 fiscal year. This fund allocation is specifically designated to bolster various student success programs, enhance infrastructure, and foster continued growth at the university.

data.title: Coinbase permitted to offer global crypto perps trading, CFTC confirms. US customers can access offshore futures.
data.description: On Friday, the CFTC announced that Coinbase has been granted approval to provide U.S. customers with the ability to engage in offshore crypto perpetual futures trading, a high-risk type of leveraged cryptocurrency trading.

data.title: Jake's Motorcars Highlights Used Bentley Continental GT with under 5,000 Miles
data.description: Jake's Motorcars in La Jolla, California, a dealer of pre-owned luxury cars, is featuring its selection of pre-owned Bentley Continental GT models with low mileage. As of May 29, 2026, the dealership is showcasing two Bentley Continental GT vehicles. This inventory offers drivers the opportunity to purchase high-end vehicles with limited usage, providing a desirable option for those in search of luxury cars.
